allow: Bash(which pnpm && pnpm --version && which psql && psql --version 2>/dev/null; node --version && which node)
Bash(npm install -g pnpm 2>&1 | tail -3 && which psql && psql --version)
Bash(pg_isready 2>&1 && psql -U postgres -c '\\l' 2>&1 | head -10 || psql -c '\\l' 2>&1 | head -10)
Bash(psql -d postgres -c "SELECT current_user;" 2>&1 && psql -d postgres -c '\\l' 2>&1 | head -15)

Bash(echo "=== Get Pages in Engineering space ==="
curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:4000/api/spaces/space-engineering | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
space=d.get\('space',{}\)
pages=space.get\('pages',[]\)
print\(f'Space: {space[\\"emoji\\"]} {space[\\"name\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(pages\)}'\)
for p in pages:
  print\(f'  - {p[\\"title\\"]} \(slug: {p[\\"slug\\"]}\)'\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== Get Activity Log ==="
curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:4000/api/admin/activity | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
acts=d.get\('activities',[]\)
print\(f'Activities: {len\(acts\)}'\)
")
